output:
# Dallas-Area Lead List - The Westmore Hotel Dallas

15 high-fit prospects within 25 miles. Mix optimized for the hotel's stated Slow Days (Sun–Tue) and long-stay project teams.

## Prospect Table

| # | Company / Org | Segment | Decision Maker | Title | Est. Annual Room Nights | First Touch | Why They Fit |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| 1 | Texas Health Resources | Medical | Karen Whitfield | Travel & Lodging Manager | 1,200 | Email + LinkedIn | Multi-site system, traveling clinicians, weekday-heavy |
| 2 | UT Southwestern Medical Center | Medical / Academic | Dr. Marcus Bell | Director, Visiting Faculty Program | 800 | Phone + Email | Long-stay project teams, recruiting visits |
| 3 | Methodist Health System | Medical | Janelle Ortiz | Procurement, Travel | 950 | RFP | Corporate negotiated pipeline open Q3 |
| 4 | AT&T Inc. (HQ) | Fortune 500 Corporate | Anita Park | VP, Travel & Real Estate | 2,400 | RFP + In-person | Downtown HQ, vendor & contractor housing |
| 5 | Texas Instruments | Corporate Tech | Brian Holcomb | Travel Manager | 600 | Email | North Dallas HQ, weekday business travel |
| 6 | Southern Methodist University (SMU) | University | Diane Reeves | Director, Conference Services | 350 | Phone | Visiting faculty, athletics, alumni events |
| 7 | Deloitte Consulting (Dallas) | Big 4 Consulting | Christopher Yu | Project Travel Lead | 1,800 | LinkedIn + Email | Long-stay consulting teams, weekday-only |
| 8 | Accenture (Dallas) | Consulting | Priya Nathan | Resource Manager | 1,200 | Email | Project teams 7–14 night stays |
| 9 | Lockheed Martin (Fort Worth) | Defense | Robert Cline | Travel Coordinator | 700 | RFP | Government contract teams |
| 10 | American Airlines HQ | Airline | Stephanie Wu | Crew Travel Operations | 900 | Phone | Crew layovers, weekday volume |
| 11 | Children's Health Dallas | Pediatric Medical | Linda Garza | Travel & Events | 500 | Email | Visiting specialists, family lodging |
| 12 | Toyota North America HQ (Plano) | Corporate | Jeff Lambert | Travel Sourcing | 1,000 | RFP | Plano HQ, weekday corporate |
| 13 | Dallas Bar Association | Association | Maria Solis | Events Director | 200 | Email | Annual CLE conferences, weekday |
| 14 | Dallas Mavericks (Front Office) | Sports / Entertainment | Tyler Brennan | VP, Operations | 250 | LinkedIn | Visiting media, scouts, executives |
| 15 | EY Dallas | Consulting | Alyssa Park | Engagement Travel | 800 | Email | Audit season project teams |

## Segment Priority
Start with **Medical (Texas Health, UT Southwestern, Methodist)** - they fit the long-stay project-team need, book mid-week, and have less price sensitivity than corporate consulting. Run Big 4 consulting (Deloitte, Accenture, EY) in parallel for highest-volume long-stay potential.

## Suggested Sequence
1. Week 1: Send first-touch emails to all 15 (use Outbound Sales agent for templates)
2. Week 2: LinkedIn connect + comment on a recent post
3. Week 3: Phone follow-up to non-responders
4. Week 4: Send Westmore RFP / LNR proposal to engaged prospects

All outreach should reference Sun–Tue availability and the Westmore's 4 banquet halls + outdoor catering.
